# Schema Weaver Documentation

> Schema Weaver — modern database schema management with visual diff, migration generation, and drift detection.

## Pages

- [Introduction](/introduction): Welcome to Schema Weaver — a PostgreSQL schema management platform with a visual SQL Editor, ER diagram, migration engine, Data Explorer, and AI assistant
- [Adding a Connection](/database/adding-a-connection): Add a PostgreSQL connection to Schema Weaver — fill in credentials, choose an SSL mode, test the connection, and understand how credentials are stored securely
- [Connection Dashboard](/database/connection-dashboard): Manage your saved connections, link them to projects, monitor live activity, and use the connection panel in the SQL Editor sidebar
- [Drift Detection](/database/drift-detection): Detect when your live PostgreSQL database has drifted from your project SQL — understand what causes drift, how Schema Weaver detects it, and how to resolve it
- [History & Rollback](/database/history-rollback): View the full audit trail of schema migrations for each connection, and roll back applied migrations with automatically generated reverse SQL
- [Database](/database): Connect Schema Weaver to your live PostgreSQL databases — manage connections, sync schemas, run migrations, detect drift, and explore your data across the SQL Editor and Data Explorer
- [Migrations](/database/migrations): Apply schema changes to your live PostgreSQL database — understand the migration pipeline, use safe mode for complex type changes, and control destructive operations
- [Pull, Diff & Push](/database/pull-diff-push): Sync your project SQL with your live PostgreSQL database — import the live schema with pull, compare differences with diff, and preview or apply changes with push
- [Terminal & sw Commands](/database/terminal): Run database operations directly from the built-in sw terminal in the SQL Editor — complete reference for all sw commands
- [AI Tools Reference](/sql-editor/ai-assistant-tools): Complete reference for all 55 tools available to Resona AI in the SQL Editor — schema analysis, file management, database migrations, graph analysis, audits, and more
- [Workspace Editing](/sql-editor/ai-assistant-workspace): Resona AI makes targeted, surgical edits to your SQL project files — single-block patches, multi-change file edits, and cross-file refactoring with full preview and rollback
- [Resona AI — SQL Editor](/sql-editor/ai-assistant): An agentic AI assistant built into the SQL Editor — generate DDL, analyze schemas, edit files across your project, run migrations, and reason through your entire schema with 50+ purpose-built tools
- [Resona AI in the ER Diagram](/sql-editor/er-diagram-ai): Analyze tables, schema groups, and your entire schema with Resona AI directly from the ER Diagram — generate SQL, suggest indexes, check normalization, and apply changes instantly
- [Grouping & Schema Clusters](/sql-editor/er-diagram-grouping): Cluster your ER diagram nodes by PostgreSQL schema namespace — resizable group containers, schema color coding, per-group stats, and lock mode
- [Path Analysis](/sql-editor/er-diagram-path-analysis): Instantly find the shortest JOIN path between PostgreSQL tables using BFS and Dijkstra algorithms. Visualize relationship chains in the SW ER Diagram.
- [Visibility & Node Types](/sql-editor/er-diagram-visibility): Control exactly which PostgreSQL object types and which schema namespaces are shown in the ER Diagram — declutter large schemas and focus on what matters
- [ER Diagram](/sql-editor/er-diagram): Visualize your entire PostgreSQL schema as a live, interactive entity-relationship diagram — all object types supported, updates in real time as you write SQL
- [File Manager](/sql-editor/file-manager): Organize your PostgreSQL schemas into cloud projects, folders, and files using the SQL Editor's built-in file manager
- [SQL Editor](/sql-editor): Design and manage PostgreSQL schemas with the SW SQL Editor. Features modular DDL projects, integrated ER diagrams, and real-time schema compilation.
- [Schema Compiler](/sql-editor/schema-compiler): Audit your database quality with the SW Schema Compiler. 20-layer static analysis for PostgreSQL DDL with A-F health grading and auto-repair fixes.
- [Schema Diff](/sql-editor/schema-diff): Compare two versions of a PostgreSQL schema side-by-side with the SQL Editor's built-in diff tool — highlight additions, removals, and modifications
- [Version History](/sql-editor/version-history): Browse and restore every saved snapshot of your SQL files in the Schema Weaver SQL Editor — never lose a working schema state
- [Writing SQL](/sql-editor/writing-sql): Use the SQL Editor's tabs, syntax highlighting, autosave, split view, and fullscreen mode to write PostgreSQL schema definitions efficiently
- [How Resona AI Works](/data-explorer/agentic-workflows): Understand the agentic loop, tool execution pipeline, and the full set of analysis tools Resona uses to answer your data questions
- [Charts & Analysis Results](/data-explorer/ai-artifacts): Understand the artifact types Resona AI generates — charts, stat blocks, and data tables — and how to interact with them
- [AI Chat Interface](/data-explorer/ai-chat-interface): Use Resona AI inside the Data Explorer to query, analyze, and visualize your data using natural language
- [Resona AI](/data-explorer/ai-overview): Overview of Resona AI inside the Data Explorer — what it can do, how to access it, and where to go next
- [Workspace & Projects](/data-explorer/ai-workspace): Manage generated reports, organize analysis into projects, and browse your full artifact history in the Data Explorer
- [Exploring Your Data](/data-explorer/exploring-data): Master the SW Data Explorer grid. Learn about canvas-based smart column sizing, server-side filtering, and real-time column distributions for PostgreSQL.
- [Exporting Data](/data-explorer/exporting-data): Export individual tables or entire database schemas to CSV, JSON, NDJSON, Excel, and SQL formats
- [Data Explorer](/data-explorer): Explore live database rows with the SW Data Explorer. A high-performance PostgreSQL workbench with virtualized grids, smart sizing, and Resona AI analysis.
- [AI Chat Guide](/resona-ai/ai-chat): How to write effective prompts, use @mentions, iterate on results, and get the best answers from Resona AI in both the SQL Editor and Data Explorer
- [Resona AI](/resona-ai): Meet Resona AI, the world's first Spatial AI Database Architect. Agentic ReAct loops for surgical DDL editing and natural language data analysis.
- [Models and Credits](/resona-ai/models): All AI models available in Resona — four tiers (FAST, SMART, ADVANCED, POWERFUL), credit costs per model, plan limits, and how to choose the right model
- [Team Collaboration](/team-collaboration): Create teams, invite members, connect projects, and share database access — all managed from Settings → Collaboration in Schema Weaver
- [Feature Comparison](/pricing/comparison): Compare Schema Weaver features across Free, Starter, Pro, and Power plans
- [Plans and Credits](/pricing): Understand Schema Weaver pricing tiers, AI credit system, and Indian regional pricing
